name: multitalk
description: Audio-driven multi-person conversational video generation - Upload audio files and a reference image to create realistic conversations between multiple people

first_audio.description: First audio file for driving the conversation
first_audio.title: First Audio

image.description: Reference image containing the person(s) for video generation
image.title: Image

num_frames.description: Number of frames to generate (automatically adjusted to nearest valid value of form 4n+1, e.g., 81, 181)
num_frames.title: Num Frames

prompt.default: A smiling man and woman wearing headphones sit in front of microphones, appearing to host a podcast.
prompt.description: Text prompt describing the desired interaction or conversation scenario
prompt.title: Prompt

sampling_steps.description: Number of sampling steps (higher = better quality, lower = faster)
sampling_steps.title: Sampling Steps

second_audio.description: Second audio file for multi-person conversation (optional)
second_audio.title: Second Audio

turbo.description: Enable turbo mode optimizations (adjusts thresholds and guidance scales for speed)
turbo.title: Turbo
